title: rhamnus × bermejoi
intro: Rhamnus × bermejoi, a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Rhamnus cathartica and Rhamnus pumilus, is commonly known as buckthorn or bermejoi buckthorn. The medicinal properties of Rhamnus × bermejoi include its ability to act as a natural laxative, due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rhamnus × bermejoi can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various gastrointestinal issues and promote overall well-being.
